content.scenarioHint: 员工在办公室遇到经理，想礼貌地开启工作汇报，询问对方是否有时间简短沟通Q2工作进展。
content.speakerText: Hi Sarah, do you have a quick moment to go over the Q2 updates?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，萨拉，有空花几分钟聊聊Q2的更新吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course, I've got the report ready.
Absolutely, I was just about to send you the summary.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了希望汇报或讨论工作进展的意图
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气礼貌且不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了 'Q2', 'updates', 'moment', 'go over' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Good morning, Lisa. Do you have a moment to go over the Q3 forecast?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，丽莎。你有空讨论一下Q3预测吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course. I've got the updated numbers ready.
Yes, absolutely — I've prepared the slides and highlighted the main trends.
Sure thing. I've reviewed all the projections and can walk you through the assumptions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并表达准备就绪
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的动词和时态
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过于正式的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 prepared / updated / reviewed / walkthrough 等职场关键词
